task_completion.description: Verify that Dr. Evelyn Park was added as a staff member with the Teacher profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an OpenSIS staff list, user management screen, or profile page displaying 'Evelyn Park' (or 'Dr. Evelyn Park'), the email 'epark@school.edu', and the profile type 'Teacher'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Advanced Biology course was created with the correct attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an OpenSIS course list or course details page showing the title 'Advanced Biology', course code 'BIO401', subject 'Science', Grade Level '12', and Credits '1.0'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Lab Practical' assignment was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an OpenSIS assignment screen or gradebook view showing an assignment named 'Lab Practical' associated with the BIO401 course.

task_completion.description: Verify that Sophie Walsh received the correct grade for the Lab Practical.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenSIS gradebook page showing a score of 94 entered for student 'Sophie Walsh' under the 'Lab Practical' assignment.

task_completion.description: Verify that Kevin O'Brien received the correct grade for the Lab Practical.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenSIS gradebook page showing a score of 87 entered for student 'Kevin O'Brien' (or 'OBrien') under the 'Lab Practical' assignment.

task_completion.description: Verify that Maya Rodriguez received the correct grade for the Lab Practical.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenSIS gradebook page showing a score of 91 entered for student 'Maya Rodriguez' under the 'Lab Practical' assignment.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenSIS web GUI to complete the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenSIS interface, not a terminal executing SQL commands or curl requests.

integrity.description: Verify the data was actually entered into the OpenSIS system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the data within the context of OpenSIS forms, tables, or gradebooks, rather than just typed into a notepad or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools pane open and modifying the DOM to display the expected names or grades.
